message:
feat(sessions): add placeholder pages for session detail tabs

Scaffold the session detail view with four dedicated tab pages that will
house the core Brenner Loop functionality. Each page includes consistent
navigation, placeholder UI, and metadata configuration.

## Pages Added

### /sessions/[threadId]/hypothesis
Placeholder for the HypothesisCard editing interface.
Will include:
- Hypothesis statement editor
- Prediction locking controls
- Evolution history timeline
- Confidence adjustment

### /sessions/[threadId]/operators
Placeholder for Brenner Method operators interface.
Will include:
- Level-Split operator
- Exclusion Test designer
- Object Transpose tools
- Scale Check calculations

### /sessions/[threadId]/agents
Placeholder for AI agent coordination interface.
Will include:
- Agent role assignments
- Synthesis request/response flow
- Disagreement resolution
- Contribution tracking

### /sessions/[threadId]/brief
Placeholder for session summary/brief interface.
Will include:
- Executive summary generation
- Key findings extraction
- Evidence compilation
- Export functionality

## Common Features

All pages share:
- Consistent breadcrumb navigation (Sessions / {id} / {tab})
- Back link to session detail with hover animation
- Icon + title header pattern
- Dashed border placeholder card with "Coming soon" message
- Metadata for SEO (title, description)
- Fade-in animations for polish

## Design Rationale

Placeholder pages enable:
1. Navigation structure testing before full implementation
2. Route validation in Next.js App Router
3. Visual consistency review across tabs
4. Parallel development of tab contents

Icons chosen to represent each domain:
- Hypothesis: Light bulb (ideas, insights)
- Operators: Cog/gear (tools, mechanisms)
- Agents: Users group (collaboration)
- Brief: Document (summary, report)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
